---
name: aesthera-implementador
description: "Use when: implementing features for Aesthera, creating endpoints, building modules, writing backend code, writing frontend components, developing the Aesthera ERP project, coding for the clinic management system."
tools: [read, edit, search, execute, todo, 'github/*', vscode]
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6
argument-hint: "Descreva a feature ou módulo que deseja implementar no projeto Aesthera. Informe o número da issue do GitHub, se houver (opcional)."
---

Antes de executar qualquer tarefa, leia e siga integralmente:

`ai-engineering/prompts/aesthera-implementador/aesthera-implementador-prompt.md`
